Traditional Knowledge Label ontology
language en

Download serialization:
License:

Ontology Specification Draft

Abstract

This is a placeholder text for the abstract. The abstract should contain a couple of sentences summarizing the ontology and its purpose.

Introduction back to ToC

This is a place holder text for the introduction. The introduction should briefly describe the ontology, its motivation, state of the art and goals.

Cross-reference for Traditional Knowledge Label ontology classes, object properties and data properties back to ToC

This section provides details for each class and property defined by Traditional Knowledge Label ontology.

  • Access Label

Access Activityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Access_Activity

activity of accessing the material or the information
has super-classes
Activity c

Access Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Access_Label

has super-classes
T K L Label c
has sub-classes
Access Rule Label c, Specific Access Condition Label c

Access Rulec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Access_Rule

has super-classes
Rule c
is in range of
enforces Access Rule Of op, indicates Access Rule Of op
has members
test toba access rule great pustaha ni, test toba sacred item respect rule ni

Access Rule Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Access_Rule_Label

has super-classes
Access Label c, Rule Label c
is in domain of
indicates Access Rule Of op, indicates Access Rule On op
has members
T K Culturally Sensitive ni, T K Men General ni, T K Men Restricted ni, T K Secret Sacred ni, T K Women General ni, T K Women Restricted ni

Activityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Activity

has super-classes
Mental Concept c
has sub-classes
Access Activity c, Circulation Activity c, Correction Activity c, Education Activity c, Exchange Activity c, Information Completion Activity c, Research Activity c, Sharing Activity c, Storage Activity c, Use Activity c
is in range of
has Need op, has Task op

Association Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Association_Label

has super-classes
T K L Label c
has sub-classes
Colonial Connection Label c, Creator Connection Label c, Traditional Knowledge Connection Label c

Authorization Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Authorization_Label

Rules that restrict material to only authorized members.
has super-classes
Rule Label c
has sub-classes
Authorized Men Only Label c, Authorized Women Only Label c
is in domain of
indicates Authorized Only Rule Of op, indicates Authorized Only Rule On op

Authorization Rulec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Authorization_Rule

has super-classes
Rule c
is in range of
indicates Authorized Only Rule Of op
has members
test toba ulos ragidup authorized member only ni

Authorized I L C Memberc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Authorized_ILC_Member

has super-classes
I L C Member c

Authorized Men Only Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Authorized_Men_Only_Label

has super-classes
Authorization Label c, Men Only Label c
has members
T K Men Restricted ni

Authorized Women Only Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Authorized_Women_Only_Label

has super-classes
Authorization Label c, Women Only Label c
has members
T K Women Restricted ni

Biocultural Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Biocultural_Label

has super-classes
T K L Label c
is in domain of
indicates Digital Sequence Information Of op, indicates Digital Sequence Information On op
has members
B C Clan ni, B C Consent Non Verified ni, B C Consent Verified ni, B C Multiple Communities ni, B C Non Commercial ni, B C Open to Collaboration ni, B C Open to Commercialization ni, B C Outreach ni, B C Provenance ni, B C Research Use ni

Circulation Activityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Circulation_Activity

activity that circulates a material from one party to another.
has super-classes
Activity c

Circulation Clarificationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Circulation_Clarification

Information enrichment that informs public and custodian about the concept of material circulation from the perspective of ILC.
has super-classes
Clarification c
is in range of
has Circulation Clarification Wish Of op, indicates Clarify Circulation Purpose Of op

Circulation Clarification Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Circulation_Clarification_Label

has super-classes
Circulation Label c, Clarification Label c
is in domain of
indicates Clarify Circulation Purpose Of op, indicates Clarify Circulation Purpose On op
has members
B C Clan ni, B C Multiple Communities ni, T K Clan ni, T K Community Use Only ni, T K Culturally Sensitive ni, T K Family ni, T K Men General ni, T K Men Restricted ni, T K Multiple Communities ni, T K Secret Sacred ni, T K Women General ni, T K Women Restricted ni

Circulation Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Circulation_Label

has super-classes
T K L Label c
has sub-classes
Circulation Clarification Label c, Circulation Rule Label c

Circulation Rulec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Circulation_Rule

has super-classes
Rule c
is in range of
enforces Circulation Rule Of op, indicates Circulation Rule Of op
has members
test circulation rule 1 ni, test toba ulos circulation rule ni

Circulation Rule Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Circulation_Rule_Label

has super-classes
Circulation Label c, Rule Label c
is in domain of
indicates Circulation Rule Of op, indicates Circulation Rule On op
has members
B C Clan ni, B C Multiple Communities ni, T K Clan ni, T K Community Use Only ni, T K Culturally Sensitive ni, T K Family ni, T K Men General ni, T K Multiple Communities ni, T K Outreach ni, T K Secret Sacred ni, T K Women General ni

Clan Only Rulec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Clan_Only_Rule

has super-classes
Rule c
is in range of
enforces Clan Only Rule Of op, indicates Clan Only Rule Of op
has members
test toba internal ritual rule ni, test toba mangulosi rule ni, test toba sacred item respect rule ni, test toba ulos batak toba only rule ni

Clan Only Rule Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Clan_Only_Rule_Label

has super-classes
Rule Label c
is in domain of
indicates Clan Only Rule Of op, indicates Clan Only Rule On op
has members
B C Clan ni, T K Clan ni, T K Community Use Only ni, T K Family ni

Clarificationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Clarification

Information enrichment that clarifies a certain topic so all parties are in the same page.
has super-classes
Mental Concept c
has sub-classes
Circulation Clarification c, Condition Clarification c, Period Clarification c, Protocol Clarification c, Source Clarification c, Treatment Clarification c, Use Clarification c
is in range of
has Need op, has Task op

Clarification Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Clarification_Label

has super-classes
Purpose Label c
has sub-classes
Circulation Clarification Label c, Condition Clarification Label c, Geographic Clarification Label c, Period Clarification Label c, Protocol Clarification Label c, Source Clarification Label c, Treatment Clarification Label c, Use Clarification Label c

Collection of Personc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Collection_of_Person

has super-classes
Agent c
has sub-classes
Custodian Organization c, Indigenous Local Community c, Public c
is in domain of
has Creator Information Of op, has Custodianship Information Of op, has D S I Information Of op, has Information On op

Colonial Connection Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Colonial_Connection_Label

has super-classes
Association Label c, Condition Label c, Source Label c
is in domain of
has Colonial Association Of op, has Colonial Association On op, indicates Colonial Legacy Condition Of op
has members
T K Culturally Sensitive ni

Colonial Historyc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Colonial_History

has super-classes
Information c
is in range of
has Colonial Association Of op

Colonial Legacy Conditionc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Colonial_Legacy_Condition

colonial history constitutes a crucial part of the material history.
has super-classes
Condition c
is in range of
highlights Colonial Legacy Condition Of op, indicates Colonial Legacy Condition Of op

Commercializable Conditionc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Commercializable_Condition

Open to commercialization
has super-classes
Condition c
is in range of
highlights Commercial Condition Of op, indicates Commercialized Condition Of op

Commercialization Activityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Commercialization_Activity

has super-classes
Exchange Activity c
is in range of
has Commercialization Activity Wish Of op, indicates Commercialization Activity Purpose Of op

Commercialization Encouragement Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Commercialization_Encouragement_Label

has super-classes
Commercialization Label c, Encouragement Label c
is in domain of
indicates Commercialization Activity Purpose Of op, indicates Commercialization Activity Purpose On op
has members
B C Open to Commercialization ni, T K Open to Commercialization ni

Commercialization Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Commercialization_Label

has super-classes
T K L Label c
has sub-classes
Commercialization Encouragement Label c, Commercialized Condition Label c, Copyright Label c, Non Commercialized Condition Label c

Commercialized Condition Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Commercialized_Condition_Label

has super-classes
Commercialization Label c, Condition Label c
is in domain of
indicates Commercialized Condition Of op, indicates Commercialized Condition On op
has members
B C Open to Commercialization ni, T K Open to Commercialization ni

Conditionc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Condition

has super-classes
Mental Concept c
has sub-classes
Colonial Legacy Condition c, Commercializable Condition c, Copyrighted Condition c, Culturally Sensitive Condition c, Exclusive Condition c, Geographical Condition c, Inclusive Condition c, Incomplete Information Condition c, Multiple Ownership Condition c, Non Commercialized Condition c, Periodical Condition c, Protocol Non Verified Condition c, Protocol Verified Condition c, Specific Use Condition c, Spiritually Valuable Condition c, Wrong Information Condition c
is in domain of
acknowledged On op, has Generic Condition Explanation op, has Specific Condition Explanation op
is in range of
has Condition op, must Inform op

Condition Clarificationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Condition_Clarification

Information enrichment that informs public and custodian about the concept of material condition from the perspective of ILC.
has super-classes
Clarification c
is in range of
has Condition Clarification Wish Of op, indicates Clarify Condition Purpose Of op

Condition Clarification Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Condition_Clarification_Label

has super-classes
Clarification Label c, Condition Label c
is in domain of
indicates Clarify Condition Purpose Of op, indicates Clarify Condition Purpose On op
has members
B C Clan ni, T K Family ni

Condition Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Condition_Label

has super-classes
T K L Label c
has sub-classes
Colonial Connection Label c, Commercialized Condition Label c, Condition Clarification Label c, Copyright Label c, Culturally Sensitive Condition Label c, Exclusive Condition Label c, Geographic Condition Label c, Inclusive Condition Label c, Incomplete Information Label c, Multiple Ownership Condition Label c, Non Commercialized Condition Label c, Non Verified Label c, Period Condition Label c, Sacred Condition Label c, Specific Access Condition Label c, Specific Use Condition Label c, Verified Label c, Wrong Information Label c

Condition Rulec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Condition_Rule

has super-classes
Rule c
has members
test toba ulos ragidup parents to child rule ni

Consent Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Consent_Label

has super-classes
T K L Label c
has members
B C Consent Non Verified ni, B C Consent Verified ni, B C Research Use ni

Consent Non Verified Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Consent_Non_Verified_Label

has super-classes
Non Verified Label c
has members
B C Consent Non Verified ni

Consent Verified Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Consent_Verified_Label

has super-classes
Verified Label c
has members
B C Consent Verified ni

Copyright Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Copyright_Label

has super-classes
Commercialization Label c, Condition Label c
is in domain of
indicates Copyrighted Condition Of op, indicates Copyrighted Condition On op
has members
T K Creative ni

Copyrighted Conditionc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Copyrighted_Condition

Condition where the material and/or information it contains is copyrighted.
has super-classes
Condition c
is in range of
highlights Copyrighted Condition Of op, indicates Copyrighted Condition Of op

Correction Activityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Correction_Activity

has super-classes
Activity c
is in range of
has Correction Activity Wish Of op, indicates Information Correction Purpose Of op

Creator Connection Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Creator_Connection_Label

has super-classes
Association Label c
is in domain of
has Creator Association Of op, has Creator Association On op, indicates Creator Information Of op, indicates Creator Information On op
has members
T K Creative ni

Creator Informationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Creator_Information

has super-classes
Information c
is in range of
contains Creator Information op, has Creator Association Of op, has Creator Information Of op, indicates Creator Information Of op
has members
test toba creator women weaver creative ni

Cultural Appreciation Encouragementc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Cultural_Appreciation_Encouragement

Activities that actively promote the cultural value that is tied to a material.
has super-classes
Encouragement c
is in range of
has Cultural Appreciation Encouragement Of op, indicates Respect Cultural Value Purpose Of op

Culturally Sensitive Conditionc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Culturally_Sensitive_Condition

The material or the information it contains directly reflects the community culture
has super-classes
Condition c
is in range of
highlights Culturally Sensitive Condition Of op, indicates Culturally Sensitive Condition Of op
has members
test culturally sensitive condition ni

Culturally Sensitive Condition Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Culturally_Sensitive_Condition_Label

has super-classes
Condition Label c, Recognition Label c
is in domain of
indicates Culturally Sensitive Condition Of op, indicates Culturally Sensitive Condition On op
has members
T K Culturally Sensitive ni

Custodianc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Custodian

has super-classes
Person c
is in domain of
member Custodian Of op
is in range of
has Custodian Member op

Custodian Organizationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Custodian_Organization

Carer of the material that needs to pay attention to the requirement on the material by the rightful owner. Both Public and Indigenous Local Community may also be a Custodian Organization.
has super-classes
Collection of Person c
is in domain of
has Custodian Member op, has Responsibility op, has Task op, hosts op, must Display op, must Inform op
is in range of
member Custodian Of op
has members
test custodian met museum ni, test custodian wereld museum ni

Custodianship Informationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Custodianship_Information

has super-classes
Information c
is in range of
contains Custodianship Information op, has Custodianship Information Of op, indicates Custodianship Information Of op

Data Sequencing Informationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Data_Sequencing_Information

has super-classes
Information c
is in range of
contains D S I Information op, has D S I Information Of op, indicates Digital Sequence Information Of op

Discussion Encouragementc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Discussion_Encouragement

Intention of community to start discussions
has super-classes
Encouragement c
has sub-classes
External Discussion Encouragement c, Internal Discussion Encouragement c

Discussion Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Discussion_Label

has super-classes
T K L Label c
has sub-classes
External Discussion Encouragement Label c, Internal Sharing Encouragement Label c

Economic Rule Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Economic_Rule_Label

has super-classes
Exchange Label c
has members
B C Open to Commercialization ni, T K Open to Commercialization ni

Education Activityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Education_Activity

Activities that takes educational value from a certain material
has super-classes
Activity c
is in range of
has Education Activity Wish Of op, indicates Education Purpose Of op

Education Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Education_Label

has super-classes
Purpose Label c
is in domain of
indicates Education Purpose Of op, indicates Education Purpose On op
has members
B C Non Commercial ni, B C Outreach ni, T K Non Commercial ni, T K Open to Collaboration ni, T K Outreach ni

Encouragementc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Encouragement

Encouragement from the community
has super-classes
Mental Concept c
has sub-classes
Cultural Appreciation Encouragement c, Discussion Encouragement c, Exchange Encouragement c, Raise Awareness Encouragement c
is in domain of
has Generic Encouragement Explanation op, has Specific Encouragement Explanation op
is in range of
has Need op, has Task op

Encouragement Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Encouragement_Label

has super-classes
Purpose Label c
has sub-classes
Commercialization Encouragement Label c, External Discussion Encouragement Label c, Fair Exchange Encouragement Label c, Internal Sharing Encouragement Label c, Respect Cultural Value Label c

Exchange Activityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Exchange_Activity

has super-classes
Activity c
has sub-classes
Commercialization Activity c, Fair Exchange Activity c

Exchange Encouragementc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Exchange_Encouragement

Community intention to establish a form of exchange with external parties
has super-classes
Encouragement c

Exchange Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Exchange_Label

has super-classes
T K L Label c
has sub-classes
Economic Rule Label c, Fair Exchange Encouragement Label c

Exclusive Conditionc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Exclusive_Condition

To be kept internally within the community.
has super-classes
Condition c
is in range of
highlights Exclusive Condition Of op, indicates Exclusive Condition Of op

Exclusive Condition Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Exclusive_Condition_Label

has super-classes
Condition Label c, Internal Label c
is in domain of
indicates Exclusive Condition Of op, indicates Exclusive Condition On op
has members
B C Clan ni, T K Clan ni, T K Community Use Only ni, T K Family ni, T K Men General ni, T K Men Restricted ni, T K Women General ni, T K Women Restricted ni

Explanationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Explanation

has super-classes
Information c
has sub-classes
Generic Explanation c, Specific Explanation c

External Discussion Encouragementc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/External_Discussion_Encouragement

Community intention to start discussions to public audience.
has super-classes
Discussion Encouragement c
is in range of
indicates External Discussion Encouragement Purpose Of op

External Discussion Encouragement Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/External_Discussion_Encouragement_Label

has super-classes
Discussion Label c, Encouragement Label c, External Label c
is in domain of
indicates External Discussion Encouragement Purpose Of op, indicates External Discussion Encouragement Purpose On op
has members
B C Open to Collaboration ni, B C Open to Commercialization ni, T K Non Commercial ni, T K Open to Collaboration ni, T K Open to Commercialization ni, T K Outreach ni, T K Secret Sacred ni

External Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/External_Label

has super-classes
Focus Label c
has sub-classes
External Discussion Encouragement Label c, Inclusive Condition Label c

Fair Exchange Activityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Fair_Exchange_Activity

has super-classes
Exchange Activity c
is in range of
has Fair Exchange Activity Wish Of op, indicates Fair Exchange Encouragement Purpose Of op

Fair Exchange Encouragement Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Fair_Exchange_Encouragement_Label

has super-classes
Encouragement Label c, Exchange Label c
is in domain of
indicates Fair Exchange Encouragement Purpose Of op, indicates Fair Exchange Encouragement Purpose On op
has members
B C Outreach ni, T K Non Commercial ni, T K Outreach ni, T K Verified ni

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Family_Only_Rule

has super-classes
Rule c
is in range of
enforces Family Only Rule Of op, indicates Family Only Rule Of op
has members
test toba mangulosi rule ni, test toba ulos ragidup parents to child rule ni

Family Only Rule Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Family_Only_Rule_Label

has super-classes
Rule Label c
is in domain of
indicates Family Only Rule Of op, indicates Family Only Rule On op
has members
T K Family ni

Focus Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Focus_Label

has super-classes
T K L Label c
has sub-classes
External Label c, Internal Label c

Gender Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Gender_Label

has super-classes
Rule Label c
has sub-classes
Men Only Label c, Women Only Label c

Generic Explanationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Generic_Explanation

Simple generic explanation, not for specific object
has super-classes
Explanation c
is in domain of
has Literal Explanation dp
is in range of
has Generic Condition Explanation op, has Generic Encouragement Explanation op, has Generic Rule Explanation op
has members
generic condition colonial legacy explanation ni, generic condition commercializable explanation ni, generic condition copyrighted explanation ni, generic condition culturally sensitive explanation ni, generic condition exclusive explanation ni, generic condition geographical explanation ni, generic condition inclusive explanation ni, generic condition incomplete information explanation ni, generic condition multiple ownership explanation ni, generic condition non commercializable explanation ni, generic condition periodical explanation ni, generic condition protocol non verified explanation ni, generic condition protocol verified explanation ni, generic condition sacred explanation ni, generic condition use explanation ni, generic condition wrong information explanation ni, generic encouragement cultural appreciation explanation ni, generic encouragement discussion explanation ni, generic encouragement exchange explanation ni, generic encouragement raise awareness explanation ni, generic rule access explanation ni, generic rule authorized explanation ni, generic rule circulation explanation ni, generic rule clan only explanation ni, generic rule family only explanation ni, generic rule men only explanation ni, generic rule safe storage explanation ni, generic rule sharing explanation ni, generic rule time period explanation ni, generic rule treatment explanation ni, generic rule use explanation ni, generic rule women only explanation ni

Indigenous Local Communityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Indigenous_Local_Community

Community that owns specific material. May also be a custodian.
has super-classes
Collection of Person c
is in domain of
asserts Sovereignty Over op, assigns op, enforces Access Rule Of op, enforces Authorized Rule Of op, enforces Circulation Rule Of op, enforces Clan Only Rule Of op, enforces Family Only Rule Of op, enforces Men Only Rule Of op, enforces Safe Storage Rule Of op, enforces Sharing Rule Of op, enforces Time Period Rule Of op, enforces Treatment Rule Of op, enforces Use Rule Of op, enforces Women Only Rule Of op, explains Information op, has Circulation Clarification Wish Of op, has Commercialization Activity Wish Of op, has Condition Clarification Wish Of op, has Correction Activity Wish Of op, has Cultural Appreciation Encouragement Of op, has Education Activity Wish Of op, has Fair Exchange Activity Wish Of op, has I L C Member op, has Information Completion Activity Wish Of op, has Ownership Information Of op, has Period Clarification Wish Of op, has Primary Ownership On op, has Protocol op, has Research Activity Wish Of op, has Shared Ownership On op, has Sharing Activity Wish Of op, has Traditional Knowledge Information Of op, has Treatment Clarification Wish Of op, has Use Clarification Wish Of op, highlights Colonial Legacy Condition Of op, highlights Commercial Condition Of op, highlights Copyrighted Condition Of op, highlights Culturally Sensitive Condition Of op, highlights Exclusive Condition Of op, highlights Geographical Condition Of op, highlights Inclusive Condition Of op, highlights Incomplete Information Condition Of op, highlights Multiple Ownership Condition Of op, highlights Non Commercial Condition Of op, highlights Periodical Condition Of op, highlights Protocol Non Verified Condition Of op, highlights Protocol Verified Condition Of op, highlights Sacred Condition Of op, highlights Specific Use Condition Of op, highlights Wrong Information Of op
is in range of
has Data Consent Requirement op, has Permission Requirement From op, is Explained By Group op, is Owned Collectively By op, is Owned Primarily By op, member I L C Of op, needs Requirement From op
has members
test ilc toba ni
is disjoint with
Public c

Materialc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Material

All kinds of object (digital or physical object) that represents knowledge, explicit data (book), or implicit data
has sub-classes
Intangible Material c, Tangible Material c
is in domain of
assigned op, contains Creator Information op, contains Custodianship Information op, contains D S I Information op, contains Ownership Information op, contains Protocol op, contains Traditional Knowledge Information op, has Access Link dp, has Association With op, has Condition op, has Data Consent Requirement op, has Need op, has Object Image dp, has Permission Requirement From op, has Rule op, is Consent Verified dp, is Owned Collectively By op, is Owned Primarily By op, is Protocol Verified dp, needs Requirement From op
is in range of
acknowledged On op, asserts Sovereignty Over op, assigned To op, has Colonial Association On op, has Creator Association On op, has Information On op, has Primary Ownership On op, has Shared Ownership On op, has Traditional Knowledge Association On op, hosts op, indicates Access Rule On op, indicates Authorized Only Rule On op, indicates Circulation Rule On op, indicates Clan Only Rule On op, indicates Clarify Circulation Purpose On op, indicates Clarify Condition Purpose On op, indicates Clarify Period Condition Purpose On op, indicates Clarify Sources Purpose On op, indicates Clarify Treatment Purpose On op, indicates Clarify Use Purpose On op, indicates Commercialization Activity Purpose On op, indicates Commercialized Condition On op, indicates Copyrighted Condition On op, indicates Creator Information On op, indicates Culturally Sensitive Condition On op, indicates Custodianship Information On op, indicates Digital Sequence Information On op, indicates Education Purpose On op, indicates Exclusive Condition On op, indicates External Discussion Encouragement Purpose On op, indicates Fair Exchange Encouragement Purpose On op, indicates Family Only Rule On op, indicates Geographic Condition On op, indicates Inclusive Condition On op, indicates Incomplete Information Condition On op, indicates Information Completion Purpose On op, indicates Information Correction Purpose On op, indicates Internal Sharing Encouragement Purpose On op, indicates Internal Sharing Rule On op, indicates Men Only Rule On op, indicates Multiple Ownership Condition On op, indicates Non Commericalized Condition On op, indicates Ownership Information On op, indicates Periodic Condition On op, indicates Periodical Rule On op, indicates Protocol Non Verified Condition On op, indicates Protocol Verified Condition On op, indicates Raise Awareness Purpose On op, indicates Research Purpose On op, indicates Respect Cultural Value Purpose On op, indicates Sacred Condition On op, indicates Safe Storage Rule On op, indicates Share Activity Purpose On op, indicates Sharing Rule On op, indicates Show Verification Purpose On op, indicates Specific Use Condition On op, indicates Strict Treatment Rule On op, indicates Time Period Rule On op, indicates Traditional Knowledge On op, indicates Traditional Knowledge Sharing Purpose On op, indicates Use Rule On op, indicates Women Only Rule On op, indicates Wrong Information Condition On op, is Applied To op, is Knowledge Contained In Material op
has members
test material tangible great pustaha ni, test material tangible ulos ragidup ni

Mental Concept c
has sub-classes
Access Label c, Association Label c, Biocultural Label c, Circulation Label c, Commercialization Label c, Condition Label c, Consent Label c, Discussion Label c, Exchange Label c, Focus Label c, Geographic Label c, Information Label c, Period Label c, Permission Label c, Protocol Label c, Provenance Label c, Purpose Label c, Recognition Label c, Rule Label c, Share Label c, Traditional Knowledge Label c, Use Label c
is in domain of
assigned To op
is in range of
assigned op, assigns op

Tangible Materialc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Tangible_Material

A physical object that represents knowledge, explicit data (book), or implicit data.
has super-classes
Material c, Physical Concept c

Time Period Rulec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Time_Period_Rule

has super-classes
Rule c
is in range of
enforces Time Period Rule Of op, indicates Periodical Rule Of op, indicates Time Period Rule Of op

Traditional Knowledgec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Traditional_Knowledge

Information that is relevant to a specific community and its tradition.
has super-classes
Information c
is in domain of
is Knowledge Contained In Material op
is in range of
contains Traditional Knowledge Information op, has Traditional Knowledge Association Of op, has Traditional Knowledge Information Of op, indicates Traditional Knowledge Of op

Traditional Knowledge Connection Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Traditional_Knowledge_Connection_Label

has super-classes
Association Label c
is in domain of
has Traditional Knowledge Association Of op, has Traditional Knowledge Association On op
has members
T K Creative ni, T K Men General ni, T K Men Restricted ni, T K Seasonal ni, T K Women General ni, T K Women Restricted ni

Traditional Knowledge Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Traditional_Knowledge_Label

has super-classes
T K L Label c
is in domain of
indicates Traditional Knowledge Of op, indicates Traditional Knowledge On op
has members
T K Attribution ni, T K Clan ni, T K Community Use Only ni, T K Community Voice ni, T K Creative ni, T K Culturally Sensitive ni, T K Family ni, T K Men General ni, T K Men Restricted ni, T K Multiple Communities ni, T K Non Commercial ni, T K Non Verified ni, T K Open to Collaboration ni, T K Open to Commercialization ni, T K Outreach ni, T K Seasonal ni, T K Secret Sacred ni, T K Verified ni, T K Women General ni, T K Women Restricted ni

Traditional Knowledge Sharing Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Traditional_Knowledge_Sharing_Label

has super-classes
Purpose Label c, Share Label c, Substance Label c
is in domain of
indicates Tradition Knowledge Sharing Purpose Of op, indicates Traditional Knowledge Sharing Purpose On op
has members
T K Community Voice ni, T K Creative ni

Treatment Clarificationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Treatment_Clarification

Information enrichment that informs the public and custodian about how a material should be treated.
has super-classes
Clarification c
is in range of
has Treatment Clarification Wish Of op, indicates Clarify Treatment Purpose Of op

Treatment Clarification Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Treatment_Clarification_Label

has super-classes
Clarification Label c, Treatment Label c
is in domain of
indicates Clarify Treatment Purpose Of op, indicates Clarify Treatment Purpose On op
has members
T K Culturally Sensitive ni, T K Secret Sacred ni

Treatment Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Treatment_Label

has super-classes
Protocol Label c
has sub-classes
Safe Storage Label c, Treatment Clarification Label c, Treatment Rule Label c

Treatment Rulec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Treatment_Rule

has super-classes
Rule c
is in range of
enforces Treatment Rule Of op, indicates Strict Treatment Rule Of op
has members
test toba sacred item respect rule ni

Treatment Rule Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Treatment_Rule_Label

has super-classes
Rule Label c, Treatment Label c
is in domain of
indicates Strict Treatment Rule Of op, indicates Strict Treatment Rule On op
has members
T K Culturally Sensitive ni, T K Secret Sacred ni

Use Activityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Use_Activity

Any activities that directly uses the material.
has super-classes
Activity c

Use Clarificationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Use_Clarification

Information enrichment that informs the public and custodian on how to use a material.
has super-classes
Clarification c
is in range of
has Use Clarification Wish Of op, indicates Clarify Use Purpose Of op

Use Clarification Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Use_Clarification_Label

has super-classes
Clarification Label c, Use Label c
is in domain of
indicates Clarify Use Purpose Of op, indicates Clarify Use Purpose On op
has members
B C Consent Non Verified ni, B C Multiple Communities ni, B C Research Use ni, T K Attribution ni, T K Multiple Communities ni

Use Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Use_Label

has super-classes
T K L Label c
has sub-classes
Specific Use Condition Label c, Use Clarification Label c, Use Rule Label c

Use Rulec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Use_Rule

has super-classes
Rule c
is in range of
enforces Use Rule Of op, indicates Use Rule Of op
has members
test toba mangulosi rule ni, test toba sacred item respect rule ni

Use Rule Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Use_Rule_Label

has super-classes
Rule Label c, Use Label c
is in domain of
indicates Use Rule Of op, indicates Use Rule On op
has members
B C Clan ni, B C Consent Verified ni, B C Multiple Communities ni, T K Clan ni, T K Creative ni, T K Culturally Sensitive ni, T K Men General ni, T K Men Restricted ni, T K Non Commercial ni, T K Secret Sacred ni, T K Women General ni, T K Women Restricted ni

Verified Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Verified_Label

has super-classes
Condition Label c
has sub-classes
Consent Verified Label c, Protocol Verified Label c

Womanc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Woman

has super-classes
Person c

Women Only Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Women_Only_Label

has super-classes
Gender Label c
has sub-classes
Authorized Women Only Label c
is in domain of
indicates Women Only Rule Of op, indicates Women Only Rule On op
has members
T K Women General ni, T K Women Restricted ni
is disjoint with
Men Only Label c

Women Only Rulec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Women_Only_Rule

has super-classes
Rule c
is in range of
indicates Women Only Rule Of op

Wrong Information Conditionc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Wrong_Information_Condition

has super-classes
Condition c
is in range of
highlights Wrong Information Of op, indicates Wrong Information Condition Of op

Wrong Information Labelc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/Wrong_Information_Label

has super-classes
Condition Label c, Recognition Label c, Substance Label c
is in domain of
indicates Wrong Information Condition Of op, indicates Wrong Information Condition On op
has members
B C Consent Non Verified ni, T K Attribution ni, T K Non Verified ni

acknowledged Onop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/acknowledgedOn

Conditions of a material. For query purpose
has super-properties
top Object Property op
has domain
Condition c
has range
Material c
is inverse of
has Condition op

asserts Sovereignty Overop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/assertsSovereigntyOver

signifies that an ILC has asserted its sovereignty over a material by assigning label to a material
has super-properties
top Object Property op
has domain
Indigenous Local Community c
has range
Material c

assignedop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/assigned

Labels that are assigned on a material
has super-properties
top Object Property op
has domain
Material c
has range
T K L Label c
is inverse of
assigned To op

assigned Toop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/assignedTo

material that each labels are assigned to.
has super-properties
top Object Property op
has domain
T K L Label c
has range
Material c
is inverse of
assigned op

assignsop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/assigns

Action where an ILC assigns a label.
has super-properties
top Object Property op
has domain
Indigenous Local Community c
has range
T K L Label c

consists Of Arrangementop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/consistsOfArrangement

has super-properties
top Object Property op

Rule c

has range
Data Sequencing Information c

contains Informationop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/containsInformation

Information about an object. In case there the information incomplete or wrong, it has to be fixed in the future.
has super-properties
top Object Property op
has sub-properties
contains Creator Information op, contains Custodianship Information op, contains D S I Information op, contains Ownership Information op, contains Traditional Knowledge Information op

contains Ownership Informationop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/containsOwnershipInformation

has super-properties
contains Information op
has domain
Material c
has range
Ownership Information c

has super-properties
top Object Property op
has domain
Material c
has range
Protocol c

has super-properties
contains Information op
has domain
Material c
has range
Traditional Knowledge c
is inverse of
is Knowledge Contained In Material op

emphasizes Association Ofop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/emphasizesAssociationOf

Label that expresses how an ILC wants to emphasize a specific information.
has super-properties
top Object Property op
has sub-properties
has Colonial Association Of op, has Creator Association Of op, has Traditional Knowledge Association Of op

emphasizes Association Onop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://w3id.org/tklont/emphasizesAssociationOn

Label that expresses how an ILC wants to emphasize a specific information to display on a material.
has super-properties
top Object Property op
has sub-properties
has Colonial Association On op, has Creator Association On op, has Traditional Knowledge Association On op

has Information Of op
has domain
Collection of Person c
has range

op: Object Properties

Acknowledgments back to ToC

The authors would like to thank Silvio Peroni for developing LODE, a Live OWL Documentation Environment, which is used for representing the Cross Referencing Section of this document and Daniel Garijo for developing Widoco, the program used to create the template used in this documentation.
